cases.diagnosis: Hit@k is true, but exact support is incomplete. The current bounded multi-intent reranker recovers one additional exact-support case without increasing max_nodes, but remaining misses need either more returned nodes or stronger query decomposition/reranking.
cases.recommended_fix: Do not broaden 1-hop expansion by default. Next work should target multi-intent query decomposition with a learned or fixture-backed reranker, then validate against the <=55 mean-token budget.
